headline: PTC Partners with TRD U.S.A. to Advance High-Performance Engine Development
summary: PTC (NASDAQ: PTC) today announced that it was named the Official Engine Design Software Partner of TRD U.S.A. (Toyota Racing Development). PTC and its Creo® computer-aided design (CAD) and Windchill® product lifecycle management (PLM) solutions will support TRD in strengthening engineering capabilities, improving efficiency, and accelerating speed to market.
